metadata.description: godplans: plan everything before anything. A single-command planning superskill emitting audit-aware, validated, agent-executable master plans.

plugins.name: godplans
plugins.description: Produce a complete, agent-executable master plan (PLAN.mdx) for a software project before any code is written: discovery, hard-to-reverse decisions, and 18 planning domains with every after-the-fact audit inverted into plan-time acceptance criteria.
